caption: This news broadcast sequence features multiple graphic overlays and images of political figures. The screen displays a News18 India logo in the upper right and a "BREAKING NEWS" banner in red and yellow across the middle. Text in Hindi appears throughout, including headlines like "नीतीश को तेजस्वी की 'सीधी धमकी'" and "2024 में JDU के साथ 'खेला' होगा?". The visual content shifts between portraits of politicians, including Nitish Kumar, labeled "मुख्यमंत्री नीतीश कुमार," and Santosh Suman, labeled "मंत्री संतोष सुमन." A Twitter post from Akhilesh Yadav is visible, containing Hindi text. The lower portion of the screen features a ticker with the phrase "शपथग्रहण के बाद BJP अध्यक्ष जे. पी. नड्डा का बयान." Across the frames, the layout remains a news-style montage, transitioning between different headlines and portraits of figures such as Saprat Chaudhary and Vijay Sinha, while the time marker remains at "10:05 PM."
